overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking along a jungle path during a rain shower. The scene transitions from afternoon daylight through a vibrant golden hour sunset to dusk, as she approaches a tribal campfire settlement with carved wooden totems.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense tropical jungle path with carved totems ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy jungle path toward the carved totems in the distance

entered.detail: muddy trail through dense tropical vegetation with visible raindrops hitting the surface
tall palm trunk with green fronds extending over the path
tall wooden pole with red and blue carved tribal patterns
rocky outcrop covered in green moss and ferns
dense green ferns and undergrowth lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow jungle path during a light rain shower. Tall carved wooden markers stand ahead on the trail, surrounded by dense tropical vegetation and palm trees. The lighting is diffused through the canopy, creating a humid, enclosed atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: jungle trail opening up with sunset approaching

events.description: passing the tall carved markers as the jungle canopy opens up
sunlight shifts to golden hour as the clouds part and sky becomes visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the jungle opens up and golden sunlight filters through

entered.detail: sky opening up with warm golden hour light breaking through the rain clouds
large tropical hardwood tree with dense dark green canopy
distant mountain peaks becoming visible through the clearing trees

segments.scene_description: Passing the carved markers, the jungle opens up to reveal a golden hour sunset. The path continues through rocky terrain with distant mountains becoming visible through the trees. The lighting shifts from diffused to warm direct sunlight as the rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open jungle clearing with vivid sunset and distant campfire

events.description: sky transforms into vivid pink and purple hues as the sun sets
campfire smoke and orange glow become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant campfire as the environment darkens into dusk

entered.detail: white smoke rising from a distant fire against the colorful sky
orange glow of campfire illuminating the tree trunks ahead
vivid pink and purple sunset clouds filling the sky
tall tree with white bark and hanging foliage

segments.scene_description: The sky transforms into vivid pink and purple hues as the sun sets. The character approaches a distant campfire, with smoke rising against the colorful sky. The environment transitions from dense jungle to a more open clearing with scattered trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement with lit campfire at dusk

events.description: approaching the tribal settlement with NPCs gathered around the campfire

agents.ego_description: approaching the campfire settlement where tribal members are gathered near a decorated totem

notable_agents.action: tribal member standing near the campfire beside the totem pole
figure tending to the campfire flames

entered.detail: decorated wooden totem pole with tribal carvings, fabrics, and orange paint
burning campfire with visible flames and embers
lit torch mounted on a wooden pole near the path
wooden shelter with tribal decorations and hanging fabrics

segments.scene_description: Reaching the tribal settlement at dusk, the character approaches a lit campfire where NPCs are gathered. A decorated totem pole stands prominently near the fire, casting flickering shadows on the path. The scene is illuminated by the warm glow of firelight against the darkening purple sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a humid jungle path that gradually opens into a tribal settlement under a transitioning sunset sky. It begins with the character walking through dense tropical vegetation and palm trees during a light rain shower, passing tall carved wooden markers under a diffused canopy. As the path leads past these markers, the jungle opens up to reveal rocky terrain and distant mountains, while the lighting shifts from a muted gray to the warm, direct glow of a golden hour sunset. The scene then expands into a clearing as the sky transforms into vivid pink and purple hues, drawing the camera toward a distant campfire with rising smoke. Finally, the movement concludes at the tribal settlement at dusk, where the warm flicker of firelight and a decorated totem pole illuminate the path against the darkening purple sky.
